subject: A figure in a wide-brimmed hat and long coat breaking through a window into a cluttered study, one hand reaching across a desk scattered with books, papers, and a small bottle
description: The scene is set at a desk interior viewed from inside a dimly lit room. Through a large multi-pane window — the glass of which is shattered outward or inward, shards catching the cold blue-grey light — a figure in a wide-brimmed hat and a long dark coat leans in from outside. One gloved hand rests on the desk surface, which is cluttered with stacked books, loose documents, and a small glass bottle. A glowing blue object sits among the papers. In the background through the window, a tall gothic building is visible in pale grey light. The atmosphere is one of covert intrusion, the figure's face partially shadowed by the hat brim.
foreground: Cluttered desk with books, papers, small bottle, and glowing blue object; broken window glass
background: Gothic building exterior visible through broken window in cold grey light
